---
title: "Inclusive Facilitation & Data Discovery"
---

### {{< fa person-digging >}} \[Overview Under Construction\]

Check back later

:::{.callout-note icon="false" collapse="false"}
### {{< fa file-pen >}} Pre-Class Preparation

On your own, consider the following:

- What's one thing your group is doing really well to ensure all team members can participate in meetings and project work?
- What's one area where your team has room to improve its inclusive facilitation practices?
- What could you personally be doing better to ensure equal access to participation?

Take notes on your thoughts because we'll discuss more in small groups and as a class when we cover this module!

:::

{{< include topics/participation-benefits.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/debate-to-dialogue.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/thinking-styles.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/participation-access.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/data-repositories.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/data-searches.qmd >}}
